mapper.sql: id, phone, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, gender, birthday, region, bio, status, interest_tags_json, oauth_accounts_json, stats_json, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.select: select from cook_users where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
select from cook_users where phone = #{phone} and deleted_at is null limit 1
mapper.update: update cook_users set password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null

update cook_users
nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, gender = #{gender}, birthday = #{birthday}, region = #{region}, bio = #{bio}, updated_at = current_timestamp
where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_users set interest_tags_json = #{interestTagsJson}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_users set status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
